name: DAWN local RAG eval — fixed regression set
note: Deterministic, offline. Exercises the hybrid retrieval + groundedness cores over a synthetic corpus. No model, no live index, no network. Add cases over time to catch retrieval-quality regressions.

cases.question: How do I treat varroa mites in my beehive?

corpus.name: hive-health.md
corpus.text: Varroa mites are the biggest threat to a honey bee colony. Treat them with oxalic acid vaporization in late fall when the colony is broodless, or use formic acid strips during the season.

corpus.name: honey-harvest.md
corpus.text: Harvest honey when frames are capped. Use an extractor, then filter and bottle. Leave enough honey for the bees to overwinter.

corpus.name: queen-rearing.md
corpus.text: To rear a new queen, graft young larvae into cell cups and place them in a queenless starter colony.

cases.answer: Treat varroa mites with oxalic acid vaporization in late fall when the colony is broodless. Formic acid strips also work during the season.
negativeClaims: Varroa mites are cured by playing loud music near the hive.

cases.question: How does the renderer talk to the main process in DAWN?

corpus.name: ipc.md
corpus.text: In DAWN the renderer reaches the main process only through the preload contextBridge, which exposes window.dawn. Every call is an ipcRenderer.invoke to an ipcMain.handle channel.

corpus.name: brain.md
corpus.text: The 3D brain visualizes workspace items as nodes and links as edges, rebuilt on demand.

corpus.name: vault.md
corpus.text: The vault stores encrypted secrets and is never searched or represented in the workspace graph.

cases.answer: The renderer talks to the main process through the preload contextBridge exposed as window.dawn, using ipcRenderer.invoke to ipcMain.handle channels.
negativeClaims: Bananas are an excellent source of dietary potassium.

cases.question: What is the right carbon to nitrogen ratio for compost?

corpus.name: compost.md
corpus.text: A healthy compost pile wants a carbon to nitrogen ratio of about 30 to 1. Browns like dry leaves are carbon; greens like food scraps are nitrogen.

corpus.name: watering.md
corpus.text: Most vegetables need about an inch of water per week, more in hot weather.

cases.answer: Aim for a carbon to nitrogen ratio around 30 to 1 — dry browns provide carbon and green food scraps provide nitrogen.
negativeClaims: Penguins migrate across the Sahara desert every spring.

cases.question: What is the capital of France?

corpus.name: compost.md
corpus.text: A healthy compost pile wants a carbon to nitrogen ratio of about 30 to 1.

corpus.name: watering.md
corpus.text: Most vegetables need about an inch of water per week.

cases.answer: The capital of France is Paris.
cases.notes: Grounding SHOULD be low here — the local corpus has no supporting evidence, so DAWN should flag the answer as not grounded.
